summary: Enthusiastic fan praises this recording as a great Dead performance, though no technical details are given
review: The reviewer is absolutely thrilled by the show, calling it "ever so great" and an inspiration. While they express deep love for the band and give a full five‑star rating, they provide no specifics about song selection, performance nuances, or recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review indicates strong positive sentiment, but the lack of detail on recording and musical specifics limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments about soundboard, audience mix, clarity or any technical issues; reviewer’s enthusiasm suggests a satisfactory listening experience.
